## Checklist
- [ ] Minimal diff; unrelated reformatting avoided
- [ ] No secrets added (API keys, signatures)
- [ ] DOM safety: user data via `textContent`/`value` only
- [ ] LocalStorage compatibility preserved (schema, defaults)
- [ ] Performance: avoid full-table rerenders; target updates
- [ ] Accessibility: labels, focus order, contrast, keyboard nav
- [ ] Tests updated/added (if applicable)
- [ ] Linked issue(s) referenced
